2.0.0.en: Added support for multiple accounts and regions (EU, AU, International). Fixed showing non-owned systems. Added improved rate limit handling. Added translations. Fixed minor memory leaks.

1.0.2.en: Homey compatibility =>12.9.0. Removed node-fetch dependency. Single plant selection during pair.

1.0.1.en: Fixed Homey Cloud and HP2026/2019 compatibility. Updated icons.
